title: pityrogramma chrysophylla var. subflexuosa
intro: Pityrogramma chrysophylla var. subflexuosa, also known as the Soft Shield Fern, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the Pteridaceae family of ferns. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The Soft Shield Fern is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting healthy digestion. It can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
